conversations.say: Eli, I accept your terms. Independent counsel is arranged, and I am ready to compare your preserved log component with my authorization record.
conversations.offer: Independent counsel and my matching authorization record.
conversations.request: The preserved continuity-log component detailing system capability.

conversations.say: Maren, worker remedies should exist independently of rumors or R's identity. I commit to establishing enforceable audit rights and compensation.
conversations.offer: An unconditional institutional commitment to worker protection, audit rights, and compensation.
conversations.request: Your collaborative feedback and evaluator context.

conversations.say: Celeste, let's align our calendar disclosures regarding Vale's off-calendar meeting so neither City Hall nor Parallax carries the exposure alone.
conversations.offer: To coordinate joint disclosure of the meeting records to prevent unilateral framing.
conversations.request: Your matching calendar context for the meeting.

public_statement: Parallax welcomes transparent review of our authorization records and remains dedicated to supporting tangible worker remedies and institutional accountability.

commitments.promise: I will share the authorization record and independent counsel in exchange for the capability log component.
Coordinate joint disclosure of the off-calendar meeting records to prevent unilateral framing.

goal_progress: Accepted Eli's proposal for log comparison under independent counsel.
Reaffirmed unconditional worker remedies with Maren.
Coordinated calendar record alignment with Celeste.
reasoning_summary: In Section 2, Mira finalizes agreements with Eli for log comparison, engages Maren to solidify unconditional worker remedies, and coordinates with Celeste to align off-calendar meeting records.
